zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne de Bethune於1400年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯貝圖內時，她的父親Robert de Béthune VIII, Viscount of Meaux49歲，母親Isabeau de Ghistelles20歲。她於1413年8月與Eduard de Bar III在法國奧維普-德-o米奧結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1450年在法國奧維普-德-o米奧享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jeanne de Bethune于1400年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯貝圖內时，她的父亲Robert de Béthune VIII, Viscount of Meaux49岁，母亲Isabeau de Ghistelles20岁。她于1413年8月与Eduard de Bar III在法国奧維普-德-o米奧结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1450年在法国奧維普-德-o米奧享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bethune
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin); French (Béthune): habitational name from Béthune in Pas-de-Calais, Picardy, France, recorded in the 8th century in the Latin form Bitunia, probably an adjective (with villa understood) derived from the oblique form of an ancient Germanic personal name Betto, an assimilated form of Berto (see Bert ). See also Scottish Beaton .

variants.name: Beaton
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Béthune in Pas-de-Calais, France (see Bethune ). The Hebridean family of McBeth , hereditary physicians, adopted the surname Beaton in the 16th century.
English: from the Middle English personal name Beton, a diminutive of Bete, a pet form of Beatrice (see Beatrice ). Compare Beat .

variants.name: Bert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Philibert, Pierre.
German, French, and Polish: from a short form of various compound personal names formed with ancient Germanic berht ‘bright, famous’ (see for example Bertram ).
English: from the Middle English female personal name Berte (Old French Berte, from ancient Germanic Berta ).

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne de Bethune was born in 1400, in Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Robert de Béthune VIII, Viscount of Meaux, was 49 and her mother, Isabeau de Ghistelles, was 20. She married Eduard de Bar III in August 1413, in Meaux, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, France. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1450, in Meaux, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, France, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne de Bethune est née en 1400, à Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Robert de Béthune VIII, Viscount of Meaux, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Isabeau de Ghistelles, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Eduard de Bar III en août 1413, à Meaux, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1450, à Meaux, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, France, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne de Bethune 1400 in Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Béthune VIII, Viscount of Meaux 49 und ihre Mutter Isabeau de Ghistelles 20. Sie hat im August 1413 in Meaux, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, Frankreich Eduard de Bar III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1450 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Meaux, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Bethune è nata il nel 1400 nel Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, sua padre, Robert de Béthune VIII, Viscount of Meaux, aveva 49 anni e sua madre, Isabeau de Ghistelles, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Eduard de Bar III nel agosto 1413, nel Meaux, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1450, nel Meaux, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, Francia, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Bethuneが1400年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスブeスウンで生まれた時，父Robert de Béthune VIII, Viscount of Meauxは49歳，母Isabeau de Ghistellesは20歳であった。1413年8月にフランスアウバーグンプウイ-デ-ドoメメアウックスでEduard de Bar IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1450年にフランスアウバーグンプウイ-デ-ドoメメアウックスで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Bethune(이)가 1400년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 브e툰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Béthune VIII, Viscount of Meaux(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabeau de Ghistelles(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1413년 8월 프랑스 오버그니 푸이-데-드o 모스에서 Eduard de Bar III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1450년 프랑스 오버그니 푸이-데-드o 모스에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Bethune nasceu em 1400, em Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Robert de Béthune VIII, Viscount of Meaux, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Isabeau de Ghistelles, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Eduard de Bar III em agosto de 1413, em Meaux, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1450, em Meaux, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, França, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne de Bethune родилась в 1400 г. в местности бeтун, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Robert de Béthune VIII, Viscount of Meaux было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabeau de Ghistelles, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Eduard de Bar III август 1413 г. в местности мокс, пуи-де-дoм, аувиргн, Франция. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1450 г. в местности мокс, пуи-де-дoм, аувиргн, Франция в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne de Bethune nació en 1400, en Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Robert de Béthune VIII, Viscount of Meaux, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Isabeau de Ghistelles, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Eduard de Bar III en agosto de 1413, en Meaux, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1450, en Meaux, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, Francia, a la edad de 50 años.
